extortion.description: [AI generated] Hypertherm is a global organization based in New Hampshire, USA. Founded in 1968, the company specializes in the design and manufacture of advanced cutting systems such as plasma, laser, and waterjet cutting solutions. Hypertherm products are employed in sectors like construction, shipbuilding, and manufacturing. They provide software, controls, and consumables for cutting applications. The company is also known for its employee ownership model.
